title: systemd unit files exist for all three services
evidence: All 4 TC-033 tests passed in 5ms: - `claw-control-plane.service` exists + contains `WantedBy=multi-user.target` - `claw-slack-relay.service` exists + contains `WantedBy=multi-user.target` - `claw-scheduler.service` exists + contains `WantedBy=multi-user.target` - `claw-control-plane.service` contains `Requires=docker.service` Suite total: 443/443 tests passed across 67 files.
